title: Kalikapur Zamindar palace
tagline: Kalikapur Zamindar palace — heritage city of West Bengal

overview.short: Kalikapur Rajbari also called Saat Mahala Bari (transl.
overview.description: Kalikapur Rajbari also called Saat Mahala Bari (transl. সাত মহলা বাড়ি) is a large historic mansion with seven parts. It is a heritage palace in Kalikapur, in Purba Burdhaman district. Kalikapur is about 175 km northwest of Kolkata and near Santiniketan, West Bengal, India. The palace built in 1819, is actually an addition to a palace built in the next village of Maukhira (just 10 minutes away), which still exists.

topPlaces.name: Bhuyera
topPlaces.description: Bhuyera is a village located in the Ausgram II CD Block in Bardhaman Sadar North subdivision of the Purba Bardhaman district, in West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Ilambazar
topPlaces.description: Ilambazar is a census town, with a police station, in Ilambazar CD block in Bolpur subdivision of Birbhum district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Bankati, Paschim Bardhaman
topPlaces.description: Bankati is a village in Kanksa CD block in the Durgapur subdivision of the Paschim Bardhaman district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Amkhoi Fossil Park
topPlaces.description: Amkhoi Fossil Park is a fossil park located near Illambazar in the Birbhum District of West Bengal, India. It contains fossilized wood 15 to 20 million years of age and is officially recognized by the State Forest Department of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Gourangapur
topPlaces.description: Gourangapur is a village in Kanksa CD block in Durgapur subdivision of Paschim Bardhaman district in the Indian state of West Bengal. The place has links with Ichhai Ghosh, king of Gopbhum, and it is believed that his capital, Dhekur, was located nearby.

topPlaces.name: Ichhai Ghosher Deul
topPlaces.description: Ichhai Ghosher Deul is located near Gourangapur in the Indian state of West Bengal. It is a late mediaeval brick-reinforced temple of the sikhara type without any image.

topPlaces.name: Bononabagram
topPlaces.description: Bononabagram is a village in Ausgram I CD Block in Bardhaman Sadar North subdivision of Purba Bardhaman district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

items.note: Bhuyera is a village located in the Ausgram II CD Block in Bardhaman Sadar North subdivision of the Purba Bardhaman district, in West Bengal, India.
Ilambazar is a census town, with a police station, in Ilambazar CD block in Bolpur subdivision of Birbhum district in the Indian state of West Bengal.
Bankati is a village in Kanksa CD block in the Durgapur subdivision of the Paschim Bardhaman district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

Amkhoi Fossil Park is a fossil park located near Illambazar in the Birbhum District of West Bengal, India. It contains fossilized wood 15 to 20 million years of age and is officially recognized by the State Forest Department of West Bengal.

Gourangapur is a village in Kanksa CD block in Durgapur subdivision of Paschim Bardhaman district in the Indian state of West Bengal. The place has links with Ichhai Ghosh, king of Gopbhum, and it is believed that his capital, Dhekur, was located nearby.
Ichhai Ghosher Deul is located near Gourangapur in the Indian state of West Bengal. It is a late mediaeval brick-reinforced temple of the sikhara type without any image.
Bononabagram is a village in Ausgram I CD Block in Bardhaman Sadar North subdivision of Purba Bardhaman district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kalikapur Zamindar palace?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kalikapur Zamindar palace is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kalikapur Zamindar palace?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (139 km) and the nearest railway station is Dhanbad Junction (115 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kalikapur Zamindar palace?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kalikapur Zamindar palace at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kalikapur Zamindar palace?
faq.a: Stays in Kalikapur Zamindar palace start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kalikapur Zamindar palace?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bhuyera, Ilambazar, Bankati, Paschim Bardhaman, Amkhoi Fossil Park, Gourangapur.
